case_title: RICHARD LEON EVANS VS. RICHARD SAMPLES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, RICHARD LEON AS TO DEFENDANT SAMPLES, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, RICHARD LEON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMPLES, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL $439.26 PRINCIPAL, $1.89 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $666.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
